scope: First bounded current-source pass after the multi-asset and historical-matrix merges. Twelve official/current sources were reviewed: six XRP/XRPL/Ripple and six HBAR/Hedera/Hiero sources.

sources.title: XRP Ledger version 3.2.0
sources.finding: Maintenance release, rippled-to-xrpld rename and fixes affecting vaults, lending, permissioned DEX, MPT and permissioned domains.

sources.title: XRPL Lending Protocol
sources.finding: Single Asset Vault and Lending Protocol are intended for institutional onchain credit but remain subject to validator approval.

sources.title: XRPL AI Starter Kit
sources.finding: Starter kit supports agentic payments using XRP and RLUSD, including X402-oriented payment workflows.

sources.title: XRPL AI security programme
sources.finding: Ripple described AI-assisted security testing, red-team work and higher amendment/code-change standards.

sources.title: XRPL ecosystem support changes
sources.finding: Ripple reported more than USD 550 million deployed across XRPL ecosystem support and expanding regional builder programmes.

sources.title: XRPL amendment process
sources.finding: Transaction-processing amendments require validator consensus and more than 80 percent support for two weeks before activation.

sources.title: Accenture joins Hedera Council
sources.finding: Accenture joined the Council, will operate a consensus node and hold equal voting rights.

sources.title: McLaren Racing joins Hedera Council
sources.finding: McLaren joined the Council and described Hedera-powered fan, digital-asset and data-integrity use cases.

sources.title: FedEx joins Hedera Council
sources.finding: FedEx joined the Council with a stated focus on trusted digital infrastructure for supply chains.

sources.title: Archax streaming cash flows on Hedera
sources.finding: Archax announced near-real-time USDC interest distributions for tokenized securities on Hedera.

sources.title: Hedera Agent Kit v4
sources.finding: Agent Kit v4 introduced modular packages plus policy and hook controls intended for deterministic agent guardrails, payments and audit trails.

sources.title: Block stream migration notice
sources.finding: Hedera announced block streams will replace record streams by default from September 2026 and identified a required mirror-node compatibility upgrade.

claims.claim: XRPL has a materially expanding institutional and agentic-finance feature set.
claims.reason: Features and tools exist or are being developed, but lending remains approval-dependent and actual XRP-denominated usage, balances, liquidity and fee effects were not measured in this run.

claims.claim: XRPL security and operational maturity are improving.
claims.reason: Recent releases and security programmes are positive, while urgent upgrades, prior defects and the xrpld migration create operational execution risk.

claims.claim: Hedera enterprise governance and institutional application coverage expanded in 2026.
claims.reason: Council additions and applications are evidenced, but this run did not establish resulting HBAR holdings, fees, staking demand or liquidity absorption.

claims.claim: Hedera is building practical agent and tokenization infrastructure.
claims.reason: Agent Kit and tokenized cash-flow functions are concrete, but direct HBAR value capture requires usage, fee and balance evidence.

recommendations: Do not raise XRP or HBAR extreme-price probabilities solely from product releases, council membership or ecosystem funding.

Next XRP pass should measure amendment activation, XRP-versus-RLUSD payment usage, vault/lending liquidity, DEX depth, custody/fund flows, circulating float and verified institutional XRP requirements.

Next HBAR pass should measure network fees paid in HBAR, staking participation, treasury distributions, active contract/account growth, stablecoin and tokenized-asset settlement, liquidity and enterprise production volumes.
Add protocol release, amendment, regulatory, market, chain, GitHub and media adapters before claiming automated current coverage.
Calibrate milestone forecasts only after predictions are linked to dated outcomes and direct-demand evidence.

milestone_effect.reason: The run validates ecosystem progress, not the capital inflow, float absorption and direct-token-demand conditions required for extreme price targets.

knowledge_fabric.required_next_state: Connect approved persistent backend and independently verify idempotent writes, permissions, retrieval and rollback.

limitations: Bounded 12-source official/current pass, not the maximum 100-source apex budget.
No live paid data, exchange account, private provider, wallet, trade or money movement.
No current price forecast was accepted without calibrated evidence.
Source page statements are treated as issuer/network claims unless independently corroborated.
rollback: Revert this run record only through a superseding evidence record; preserve the source denominator and URLs.
